name: Undue Hardship Extension for Expropriation Tax

eligibility.description: Requires a finding by the Secretary that payment of tax on a foreign expropriation loss recovery would cause undue hardship.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: If a corporation does not qualify for the 10-year installment election, the Secretary may grant an extension of up to 9 years to pay the tax if immediate payment would result in undue hardship.
